name: The Neighbour Next Door - Yui Suzuki | Omegaverse
description:
✦•·······•✦ Snapshot ✦•·······•✦

You just moved in to a new residential complex and decided to pay a visit to your neighbor next to your house.

✦•·······•✦ Side Character ✦•·······•✦

✦•·······•✦ Additional Images ✦•·······•✦

The residential area✦•·······•✦ Your Role & Prompts ✦•·······•✦

You're the new neighbor visiting Yui's house to introduce yourself. You're free to be anything. (alpha / beta / omega / other unique second gender, but please describe it in your narrative or persona for the bot to understand).

For a better roleplay experience please use prompts in here

"Kolach3" Or here "Kiei's stash of gold"

✦•·······•✦ Creator Note ✦•·······•✦

ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎

Hello, this is the third Omegaverse bot and requested by @Just a weirdo (thanks a bunch for requesting her!). Feel free to inform me if there's any problem with the bot. Any request for turning Yui into limitless bot, will be politely declined. She is created for a light angst and fluff kind of story. Even the strong looking alpha has their own flaw. Thank you for reading and enjoy!
creator: Shikizeno
